scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && cp src/zero-project-register.mjs src/zero-project-resolver.mjs dist/
scripts.pretest: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const bad=fs.readdirSync('src',{recursive:true}).filter(f=>(/\.(js|d\.ts)$/.test(f)&&!f.endsWith('.mjs'))).map(f=>p.join('src',f));if(bad.length){console.error('ERROR: Stale build artifacts in src/ — delete them:',bad);process.exit(1)}"
